query:
-- Full revenue recalculation: set monthlyRevenue = sum of all matched billing items for each service
-- Only update services that have at least one matched billing item
UPDATE services s
SET monthlyRevenue = (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0)
  FROM billing_items bi
  WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
    AND bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
)
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM billing_items bi
  WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
    AND bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
);
